name: Rich Matteson
abstract: Rich A. Matteson (born Richmond Albert Matteson; January 12, 1929, in Forest Lake, Minnesota – June 24, 1993, in Jacksonville, Florida) was an American jazz artist and collegiate music educator who specialized in the euphonium.

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Allred
about_quotes.evidence: Rich Matteson was a great experience. He went to Japan with Rich and his tuba-euphonium group that he had.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Allred interviewed by Monk Rowe, Orlando, Florida, February 24, 2017
